title: The Birthday Party
description: Your friend's birthday party is today. But the older kids said they are playing football at the park at the same time.

choices.text: Go to the park. The older kids never invite you.
choices.flavor: You showed up. You got picked last. You did not care. You were in the game. Cake acquired later.

choices.text: Go to the party. Your friend would be upset.
choices.flavor: You ate three slices of cake and won the relay race in the backyard. Good enough.

title: Faster Than Marcus
description: Marcus beat you in the race at recess. You cannot stop thinking about it. You want another shot.

choices.text: Race Marcus every day until you win
choices.flavor: Monday: lost. Tuesday: lost by less. Friday: dead tie. Next Monday: you won. Marcus wants a rematch.

choices.text: Beat Marcus at something else instead
choices.flavor: You cannot outrun him. But you can out-throw him, out-catch him, and out-tackle him. That works.

title: New Game vs. Outside
description: New video game just dropped. All your friends are playing online. But the weather is perfect.

choices.text: Go outside. The game will still be there tonight.
choices.flavor: You ran around until dark. Came home, played the game, fell asleep on the couch. Full day.

choices.text: Play the game. It is raining in your brain.
choices.flavor: You played Madden for four hours. You learned three new formations. Not a total loss.
